description: Polygon-as-UI quality prioritization surface. The radar IS the picker: each axis is a clickable hit-target that opens a per-ility dialog (level + rationale). Pairs with <iron-triangle> via data-bind-to to read capacity. Form-associated; serializes the quality-vector schema.

attributes.name: data-bind-to
attributes.description: ID of a sibling <iron-triangle> to read capacityPoints from

attributes.name: data-capacity-points
attributes.description: Literal capacity fallback when no triangle is bound

attributes.name: data-cost-weights
attributes.description: JSON object overriding default per-ility cost weights

attributes.name: data-show-envelope
attributes.description: Show the capacity envelope polygon (default true; set to "false" to hide)

attributes.name: data-min-rationale
attributes.description: Min characters for a Critical row's rationale

attributes.name: data-max-rationale
attributes.description: Max characters for the rationale textarea

events.name: quality-target:change
events.detail: { vector, rationales, costWeights, capacityPoints, criticalSum, overrunRationale, ironTriangleHash, source, field }

events.name: quality-target:over-budget
events.description: The selection just crossed into over-budget

events.name: quality-target:under-budget
events.description: The selection just returned within budget
